name: Cinnamon Toast Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease muffin pan or line with paper liners.
3. In a separate bowl, mix cinnamon and sugar for topping; set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
5. In another bowl, thoroughly mix milk, egg, oil, and sugar.
6. Add the dry mixture to the wet mixture and stir until just combined. Do not overmix.
7. Fill muffin pan 2/3 full with batter.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes.
9. Remove muffins from oven and immediately dip tops in melted butter, then in the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
10. Makes 9-11 muffins.
